examples.input: Tom is baking at home and realizes he forgot to buy parchment paper. He needs to find a substitute to prevent food from sticking to the baking sheet. Which of the following items in his kitchen is the most suitable alternative?

David is working on an oil painting and needs a thinner to adjust the consistency of the paint, but he realizes he has run out. He needs to find an item that can serve as a temporary substitute. Which of the following items is the most likely substitute for an oil painting thinner?

John is repairing a wooden table at home when he realizes he needs sandpaper to sand the surface, but he has run out. He needs to find a substitute for sandpaper. Among the following items in his garage, which is the most suitable alternative to sandpaper?

Sarah is preparing dinner when she realizes she does not have a garlic press. She needs to find a substitute item to mince garlic. Which of the following items in her kitchen is the most likely substitute for a garlic press?

Emily is out when it suddenly starts to rain. She does not have an umbrella and needs to find an item to temporarily shield herself from the rain. Please identify the substitute for an umbrella from the following options.

Mark wants to make a greeting card at home but realizes he does not have any colored paper. He has the following items on his desk. Please help him choose an item to serve as a substitute for colored paper.
Jennifer wants to apply a face mask at home but realizes she has run out of facial mask sheets. The following items are on her vanity; which one functions most similarly to a mask sheet?
Robert wants to measure the length of a wooden board at home but cannot find a tape measure. Which of the following options is the most suitable substitute for a tape measure?

Judy needs to temporarily secure some documents in her office, but she cannot find a stapler. She finds the following items in her drawer. Which one is most suitable for holding the documents together?
Alex is working on a craft project at home and needs a small hammer, but he cannot find one. In his toolbox, which of the following items is the most suitable substitute for a small hammer?

Kevin is having a picnic outdoors when he realizes he forgot to bring a knife, but he needs to cut some fruit to share with his friends. He looks through his bag and finds the following items. Which one is most likely to be used to cut the fruit?

Ms. Lee is doing laundry when she discovers she has run out of laundry detergent. She needs to find an item that can be used instead to clean her clothes. In her laundry room, she has the following items. Please choose the one that is most suitable as a substitute for laundry detergent.

Michael was doing his homework when he accidentally spilled ink onto the desk. However, he had run out of ink remover and needed to find an alternative to clean the stain. Which of the following items would be the best substitute?

James is preparing for a candlelit dinner in the evening when he realizes he forgot to buy candles. He needs to find an item that can replace candles to create a similar atmosphere. He looks through his cabinet and finds the following items. Please help him choose one as a substitute for candles.

Tom is working late at the office and feels hungry, but the microwave in the office is broken. He needs to find an alternative way to heat his food. In the pantry, he finds the following items. Which one is the most suitable substitute for a microwave?

Emma is traveling in a city when she suddenly realizes she forgot to bring her phone stand, but she needs to record a video. She looks through her own bag and her travel companion’s bag and finds the following items. Which one is most likely to serve as a substitute for a phone stand?

Liam is camping in the mountains with his friends and needs to start a campfire at night when he suddenly discovers that the lighter is out of fuel. Inside the tent, there are several items that might help in an emergency. Please help him choose the one most likely to light the campfire.

Lily is drawing the anime character Gojo Satoru in the art room and needs white paint, but the white paint has just run out. After searching around the classroom for a while, she finds the following items. Which one is most likely to serve as a substitute for white paint?

A mother is cooking when she suddenly realizes that the empty seasoning bottle she planned to use is missing. She needs to find something that can temporarily hold seasonings instead. Among the following items, which is the most suitable substitute for a seasoning bottle?

Ken’s family goes hiking in the wilderness for the weekend. Ken’s father needs a compass to determine their direction, but his compass is missing. They search through the items they are carrying and find the following. Which one is most likely to serve as a substitute for a compass?

Mr. Lee has just arrived at the office and finds a small tear at the cuff of his suit jacket. He wants to fix it quickly before a meeting, but he does not have a sewing kit. In his drawer, he finds the following items. Which one is the most suitable as a temporary substitute for a sewing tool?

David is writing a paper and needs a highlighter to mark important sections, but his highlighter has run out of ink. He has the following items nearby. Which one is most likely to serve as a substitute for a highlighter?

Lily is about to meet her crush when she suddenly notices in the mirror that her hair is a bit messy. She reaches into her bag and realizes she forgot to bring a comb. There happens to be a fast-food restaurant nearby. Which of the following items in the restaurant would be the most suitable substitute for a comb?

Tom is looking for a container in his workshop to store small tools and screws, but he does not want to buy a new toolbox. In the workshop, he has the following items. Which one can be used instead of a traditional toolbox?

Mark’s door handle keeps making a squeaking sound, and he wants to find a lubricant to fix the problem, but after searching around the house he cannot find any. He only finds the following items. Which one can be used as a lubricant?
Jane wants to create a cozy reading nook in a corner of her home but cannot find a proper bookshelf. She has the following four items. Which one can she use as a temporary bookshelf?
Kevin’s computer keyboard is covered in dust. Since his usual desktop vacuum is out of power, he needs an alternative. Which of the following items can be used to clean it?
Lucy wants to DIY a toy for her dog Max because his silicone chew ball has gone missing. Which of the following items can she use to make a toy most similar to the previous one?
Jack’s car-cleaning cloth has gone missing, and he needs an absorbent tool to wipe down the car. In the storage room, he finds the following items. Which one can be used as a substitute?

While painting in the park, Sarah realized she had forgotten to bring her palette. She searched her surroundings and found only four items. Please help her select the most likely substitute for a palette from the following options.

Mark's figure display shelf is full. He brought home some new blind box figures, but the new shelf he ordered hasn't arrived yet. He wants to find a suitable item to display his newly purchased figures. Which of the following items could serve as a substitute for a display shelf?

Lily injured her finger and needs a makeshift finger cot to protect the wound. However, there is no first aid station nearby, and she only has the following items. Which item can she use to make a finger cot?

Sam forgot to bring his earphone case. Fortunately, his Bluetooth earphones are small, and he found a few items in his bag. Please select the item that is least likely to serve as a substitute for an earphone case.

Chris wants to make a simple DIY pen holder at home but cannot find a suitable container. He has the following four items available. Which one is the least likely to serve as a substitute for a pen holder?

Tom wants to make a tissue box but feels that doing it himself is too much trouble, so he wants to find a ready-made substitute at home. He has the following four items available. Which one can serve as a substitute for a tissue box?

Elsa was preparing dinner and needed to toss a large bowl of salad thoroughly, but she couldn't find a mixing tool. She had the following items nearby. Which item is the least likely to serve as a mixing tool?

Alice plans to add a few drops of olive oil to her salad. She wants to avoid adding too much, but she lacks a dropper to control the amount. Please help her select one of the following kitchen items to serve as a makeshift dispenser.

Ruby wanted to bake a cake at home, but she discovered that her electric mixer was broken. She needs to find a substitute mixing tool. She has the following items in her kitchen. Which one can serve as a makeshift mixer?
You are deep cleaning your home and realize you have run out of glass cleaner. Which of the following items can serve as a substitute for cleaning glass?
Lisa's sweater has pilled, and she does not have a dedicated fabric shaver. She could only find a few items. Which of the following can help her remove the pills from her sweater?

Mr. Brown wants to polish his leather shoes, but he has no shoe polish at home, and the local shoe repair shop is closed for the holidays. Which of the following items should he use to treat his leather shoes?

Leo wants to fly a kite in the park, but the kite he brought has a large hole in it. He needs to find similar material in his bag to make a makeshift kite. Which of the following items found in his bag is the most suitable substitute for a kite?
Liz is moving and needs to pack some fragile items, but she lacks Styrofoam or other packing materials. Which of the following items is the most suitable substitute for protecting fragile items?

Jessica wants to make a DIY face mask at home but does not have any non-woven fabric sheets. She found a few items in the bathroom that might work. Which of the following items is the most likely substitute for non-woven fabric?

Ben was having a picnic in the park when he realized he did not have enough plastic cutlery. Since there were no stores nearby to buy disposable utensils, he had to find a substitute among the items he had on hand. Which of the following items could serve as a substitute for cutlery?

Mark wants to hang a new painting at home but cannot find nails or a hammer. He needs to find a tool capable of driving a nail. Which of the following items in his utility room could serve as a makeshift hammer?

Sarah needs to change the water in the flower vase, but she doesn't have any flower food. Her father gives her four items to see if she knows which one can work as a substitute to keep the flowers fresh longer. ()

While taking a shower, you want to use a loofah to scrub your back, but you cannot find it. There are several other items in the bathroom. Which of the following can serve as a substitute for the loofah?

Mike is making dumpling wrappers and preparing to roll out the dough, but he discovers that the rolling pin is missing. He looks around the kitchen. Which of the following items is most suitable to serve as a substitute for the rolling pin?
Sarah was reading a book and needed a bookmark, but she couldn't find one in her room. She looked around. Which of the following items that she found is the most suitable to use as a bookmark?
Leo was playing on the beach and wanted to build a sandcastle, but he did not bring any beach toys. He had the following items nearby. Which one is most likely to be used to build a sandcastle?
Lisa wanted to make a pizza at home but did not have a pizza stone. She found the following items. Which one is the most suitable substitute for a pizza stone?
When caring for indoor plants, it is necessary to provide support, but a specialized stake is not available. Which of the following items can be used as a substitute to support the plant?

While cooking at home, James damaged his cutting board by chopping meat too forcefully. He needs a temporary substitute to slice vegetables. Which of the following items in his kitchen could be used as a replacement?
Liam’s desk lamp has broken, and he does not have a spare. He needs a light source so he can continue reading. Which of the following items is least likely to serve as a temporary lighting tool?

Ethan’s computer desk is covered in dust, but his usual feather duster is being cleaned, so he needs to find an alternative to clean up. Which of the following items is most likely to serve as a temporary cleaning tool?
You discover that your cat has kicked and shattered its food bowl, and you urgently need a substitute to hold the food. You find the following items in your home; which one could be used?

While painting outdoors, Raphael accidentally lost her paintbrush. There are no stores nearby, only fields and countryside. She needs to find a substitute to finish her oil painting. Which of the following items is least likely to serve as a temporary paintbrush?

While hanging laundry in his large rural backyard, Old Tom accidentally broke his drying pole. Several items are scattered around the yard; which of the following is he most likely to use as a temporary replacement for the pole?

Under the scorching sun, Robert is hosting an outdoor barbecue but realizes he forgot his lighter. He decides to use a traditional method to ignite the charcoal. He finds several items nearby; which of the following is most likely to assist him in starting the fire?

Jane was cutting out paper snowflakes when she stepped away for a bathroom break. When she came back, her scissors were gone. Which of the following items nearby could she use as a replacement for the scissors?

While cleaning his room, Leo realized that he didn't have any new brooms and the old one was completely falling apart. He went to the storage room to look for something useful. Which of the following items is least likely to serve as a temporary broom?

Lily is a travel vlogger who passed by an outdoor boxing gym and wanted to film some content, only to discover that her camera tripod was missing. Which of the following items is least likely to serve as a temporary substitute for her tripod?

Xavier is an outdoor fitness enthusiast. After an intense outdoor workout, he needs to cool down, but he doesn't have a fan or any ice cubes with him. He finds several items nearby; which of the following is least likely to be used for cooling down?

While camping in a forest park, Ruby wanted to hang some decorations inside her tent for a photo shoot, but she realized she had no tape or adhesive hooks. She found the following items in her bag; which of the following is impossible for her to use to hang the decorations?

While engrossed in his homework at a coffee shop, Chris made a mistake and wanted to erase it, but he realized his eraser was missing. Which of the following items is he most likely to use as a temporary substitute?

While preparing a Japanese dish, a father needs only the egg whites. He has to separate the whites from the yolks but does not have a specialized kitchen tool for the task. Which of the following items could help him?

While hosting an outdoor barbecue, you need to baste your meat skewers but realize you have forgotten your brush. The only items available are the ingredients in a basket at your feet. Which of the following is the least suitable substitute for a brush?

Grace is about to host a dinner party at home, but she realizes she doesn't have enough tablecloths for the tables. She finds the following items around the house; which one is least suitable as a temporary substitute for a tablecloth?
Ms. Miller wants to take a set of fun photos of her pet cat but realizes she is missing some props. She finds the following items; which one is most suitable to use as a photo prop?

While frying an egg at home, Ryan discovers that his spatula has vanished. He looks around for an item that could serve as a temporary substitute to flip the egg. Which of the following is he most likely to use?

Daniel wants to trim the bushes in his yard, but his shears are not sharp enough. He needs to find a tool to replace the shears to get the job done. Which of the following items in his toolbox could be used for trimming?

While having dinner with his new girlfriend, Oliver unexpectedly discovers that he cannot open the bottle of beer he brought. He needs to find an item to substitute for a bottle opener. Which of the following items should he avoid using?
While baking cookies, Ms. Taylor needs to sift some flour, but she realizes her sifter is missing. Which of the following items is she least likely to use as a substitute for sifting flour?

Dylan wants to practice his calligraphy and needs a hard, flat surface to support his writing, but he doesn't have a desk available. Which of the following items is he least likely to use as a substitute for a desk?
Lewis realized his pet dog's silicone collar is missing, and he wants to make a new one. He has the following materials to choose from; which item is most suitable as a substitute for the collar?
While doing her nails at home, Sarah needs a rhinestone picker to apply rhinestones, but she can't find one. Which of the following items could she use as a substitute?

While attending a financial seminar, Arthur notices there is dust on his phone screen, but he doesn't have a dedicated cleaning cloth with him. Which of the following items is he least likely to use to clean his phone screen?

While packing your luggage at the end of a trip, you want to store some souvenirs to prevent them from being crushed or damaged, but you don't have a storage box of the right size. Which of the following items is least suitable to serve as a temporary storage container?
Sarah needs to post an important memo next to her computer at the office, but she realizes she has run out of tape. Which of the following items could serve as a temporary substitute?

While repairing his bicycle, Tom realizes he doesn't have a wrench. He needs to tighten the bike seat bolt. Looking through his toolbox, he finds the following items. Which one is most suitable to use as a temporary wrench?
While doing aerobics at home, Jane needs a yoga block to assist with her exercises, but she doesn't own one. She looks around for a substitute; which of the following items is most suitable?

While conducting an experiment at home, Leo needs to measure the volume of a liquid, but he doesn't have a measuring cup. He looks around the living room and finds the following items. Which of the following is most likely to work as a replacement?

While at home, David accidentally breaks his salt container and needs to find a temporary container to store the salt. He finds several items in his storage room; which of the following is most likely to be used as a temporary salt container?

During a power outage, Sarah cannot find any candles in her home. She needs to find an item that can serve as a temporary light source. Which of the following items can be used for emergency lighting?

While preparing to make fresh pasta at home, Nicholas realizes he doesn't have a dedicated pasta drying rack. He looks around the kitchen; which of the following items is most suitable as a temporary substitute?

Darren wants to loosen the soil in his potted plant, but he can't find a gardening trowel. His friend lends him a few items; which of the following could he use as a substitute for a gardening trowel?

Nancy wants to do some strength training at home to work on her arm muscles, but she doesn't have any dumbbells. Which of the following items is most suitable as a substitute for dumbbells during her workout?
Molly wants to prepare a grilled fish feast at home, but she realizes her grill rack is missing and needs to find a substitute. Which of the following items is most suitable for grilling fish?
Henry just finished baking a batch of cookies but realized he doesn't have any oven mitts. The bathroom is right next door; which of the following items is least likely to work as a substitute?

Sarah just got accepted into her dream university and is hosting a celebration at home. However, she doesn't have enough ice buckets to keep the drinks cold. Which of the following items could she use as a temporary ice bucket?

Alice suddenly needs a small container to hold some loose staples. Her drawers are completely full, and she doesn't have any spare small boxes. There are several items on her desk; which of the following is she least likely to use as a container for the staples?

Henry’s hamster needs a warm cotton nest for the winter, but the previous one was chewed to pieces. He has several unused items at home. Which of the following is the least suitable for making a hamster nest?
While at the beach, Sophia wants to make a simple, makeshift beach volleyball net. She and her friends have the following items; which one is she most likely to use?

James just had his newly handmade fabric wallet taken by a friend. Since his new fabric hasn't arrived yet, he needs to find a substitute around the house. Which of the following items is least likely to be turned into a functional wallet?

Chloe experiences cold hands and feet during the winter and requires a heat source to stay warm, but her hot water bottle is missing. Which of the following items can be used as a substitute for a hot water bottle?

Sid is hosting a party at home and needs to hang some balloons, but he cannot find any string. He finds the following items in his storage room; which of them can be used as a substitute for string to hang the balloons?

You are outdoors and your phone has run out of battery. You need an emergency charge but do not have a power bank. You only have the following items in your bag; which of them is most likely to serve as a temporary power source?

You are in a clothing store fitting room and realize there are no clothes hangers. Since you have already taken off your clothes, it is inconvenient to leave to get one, and you must find a substitute within the room. Which of the following items is least suitable as a substitute for a clothes hanger?

Your clothes got wet while you were out in the rain and need to be dried quickly. However, there is no clothes dryer available at home—only the items listed below. Which of the following can be used as a substitute for a clothes dryer?
